header.description: Passionate about creating high-performance web and mobile applications. I am seeking an internship to deepen my skills and contribute to innovative projects.

planify.title: Planify
planify.description: A platform that combines all the new ways to book and manage your services with complete peace of mind.

travel.title: Travel Booking Platform
travel.description: Creation of a showcase application and a reservation management system for a transport cooperative.

api.title: REST CRUD API Development
api.description: Design of a complete REST API with Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL, fully documented from end to end with Swagger.

motivation.title: My Motivations
motivation.subtitle: Beyond lines of code, here is the mindset and values I bring to every project.

commitment.title: Serious & Committed
commitment.desc: When I take on a project, I fully commit to it. Rigorous and highly motivated, I make it a priority to deliver clean work and honor my commitments.

teamwork.title: Team Player
teamwork.desc: Development doesn't happen in isolation. I enjoy sharing, exchanging ideas, and collaborating to move forward together. I know how to listen and adapt for collective success.

learning.title: Always Learning
learning.desc: Tech evolves rapidly, and that's exactly what drives me. Naturally curious, I am constantly eager to learn new things, take on challenges, and sharpen my skills.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.subtitle: All the technologies, languages, and testing tools I master to design robust and scalable applications.

parcours.title: My Journey
parcours.subtitle: My academic background and certifications in the software development field.

licence.title: Bachelor's Degree Cursus
licence.desc: Current university studies focused on computer science, software engineering, and information system architectures.

udemy.title: Udemy Certificate - REST API
udemy.desc: Successfully completed specialized training in building robust and secure REST APIs using Node.js, including database management and back-end architectures.

bac.title: Baccalauréat
bac.desc: High School Diploma (Baccalauréat) obtained at Lycée Jacques Rabemananjara in Tamatave, marking the start of my scientific and technical career.
